case_title: LEAH PIMENTEL VS. ADIANNA R. HERMISON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-29-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERMISON, ADIANNA R.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIMENTEL, LEAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HERMISON, ADIANNA R. THE JUDGMENT IS BASED IN PART, ON PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 AT THE END OF DEFENDANT'S TENANCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,595.00 FILED BY PIMENTEL, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT HERMISON, ADIANNA R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
